About Us

YOUR TRUSTED KUTCHINA PARTNER.

Spark Innovations is a leading distributor of premium kitchen appliances, bringing innovation and style to Indian homes.

SPARK

ESTABLISHING EXCELLENCE
IN KITCHEN SOLUTIONS.

Spark Innovations was founded with a mission to simplify kitchen management for Indian households. We believe that a kitchen is the heart of a home, and it deserves the best technology.

Over the years, we have grown into a trusted name for Kutchina products, serving thousands of satisfied customers across the region. Our commitment to quality and service has made us the preferred choice for homeowners and interior designers alike.

500+

Products Delivered

100%

Authenticity Guarantee

OUR CORE VALUES

Trusted Quality

As authorized Kutchina distributors, we guarantee 100% authentic products with official warranties.

Fast Service

Quick delivery and professional installation services to get your kitchen running in no time.

Expert Advice

Our consultants help you choose the right appliances tailored to your specific kitchen needs.

After-Sales Support

Comprehensive maintenance and support for all products purchased through our distribution center.

Spark Innovations

Your trusted partner for premium Kutchina kitchen appliances. Explore chimneys, hobs, cooktops, and more.
